nasb.text: In these lay a multitude of those who were sick, blind, lame, and withered, [waiting for the moving of the waters;

esv.text: In these lay a multitude of invalids—blind, lame, and paralyzed.

cnv.text: 在那裡躺著許多病人，有瞎眼的、瘸腿的和癱瘓的。

ccb.text: 里面躺着瞎眼的、瘸腿的、瘫痪的等许多病人。

csbs.text: 柱廊里躺着一群患病的，有瞎眼的、瘸腿的、瘫痪的。他们正等着池水动起来，
